mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transaction (user_id, type, amount, category_id, category_name, description, account, date, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{amount}, #{categoryId}, #{categoryName}, #{description}, #{account}, #{date}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE transaction SET type = #{type}, amount = #{amount}, category_id = #{categoryId}, category_name = #{categoryName}, description = #{description}, account = #{account}, date = #{date} WHERE id = #{id}
